finding: `tasks scope add` uses `--add`, but `--paths` is a natural guess and fails with generic `ATM_CLI_USAGE`.
expectedBehavior: When an operator uses `--paths` with `tasks scope add`, ATM should either alias it to `--add` or print the exact corrected command.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed on 2026-07-13: `tasks scope add --paths <paths>` now aliases to `--add <paths>` through the same CSV/quote normalization, and the missing-add usage text names the alias.
